kairos 1.2.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    Seriation Methods Event Date Model Bibliography
  • Changelog

Function reference

Dating Methods

event() summary(<EventDate>)
Event and Accumulation Dates
mcd()
Mean Ceramic Date
predict_event() predict_accumulation()
Predict Event and Accumulation Dates

Chronological Patterns

aoristic()
Aoristic Analysis
apportion()
Chronological Apportioning
fit()
Frequency Increment Test
roc()
Rate of Change

Seriation Methods

permute() get_order()
Rearranges a Data Matrix
seriate_average()
Correspondence Analysis-Based Seriation
seriate_rank()
Reciprocal Ranking Seriation
seriate_refine()
Refine CA-based Seriation

Resampling Methods

jackknife(<EventDate>) bootstrap(<EventDate>)
Resample Event Dates
bootstrap(<MeanDate>) jackknife(<MeanDate>) simulate(<MeanDate>)
Resample Mean Ceramic Dates

Visualization

plot(<AoristicSum>,<missing>) image(<AoristicSum>) plot(<RateOfChange>,<missing>)
Plot Aoristic Analysis
plot(<EventDate>,<missing>)
Event Plot
plot(<IncrementTest>,<missing>)
Detection of Selective Processes
plot(<MeanDate>,<missing>) plot(<SimulationMeanDate>,<missing>)
MCD Plot
plot_time()
Abundance vs Time Plot

Getters and Setters

as.data.frame(<MeanDate>) as.data.frame(<AoristicSum>) as.data.frame(<IncrementTest>)
Coerce to a Data Frame
coef(<EventDate>) fitted(<EventDate>) residuals(<EventDate>) sigma(<EventDate>) terms(<EventDate>)
Extract Model Results
weights(<AoristicSum>) weights(<CountApportion>)
Get or Set Parts of an Object
time(<EventDate>)
Sampling Times
`[`(<MeanDate>) `[`(<IncrementTest>)
Extract or Replace Parts of an Object

On this page

kairos is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
